chapter_voice_summary: Chapter 2's voice is didactic and corrective. BG 2.12, the formal sāṅkhya statement of eternality, modulates from the diagnostic sharpness of 2.11 toward more expansive doctrinal teaching. The engineering layer for 2.12 ('the framing the śloka establishes is not metaphysical bravado; it is a discipline of recognition') maintains the chapter's didactic register without becoming consoling or motivational. The voice is appropriately patient — the architect explaining a long horizon to a five-year-thinking team — which matches the chapter's progression from rebuke (2.2-2.3) through diagnostic (2.11) into doctrinal exposition. Voice consistent.
